requirement_topic.en: SEGESA Grid Connection for BESS — 230/400 V 50 Hz System and Absence of Published Technical Connection Framework
requirement_topic.zh: SEGESA BESS并网——230/400 V 50 Hz系统及缺乏已发布技术并网框架
requirement_topic.zht: SEGESA BESS併網——230/400 V 50 Hz系統及缺乏已發布技術併網框架

summary.en: SEGESA (Sociedad de Electricidad de Guinea Ecuatorial) is the national electricity utility of Equatorial Guinea and the sole grid operator responsible for generation, transmission, and distribution. The Equatorial Guinea grid operates at 230/400 V (single-phase/three-phase), 50 Hz — a Spanish/IEC-legacy system consistent with the country's Hispanophone Central African context. All grid-connected BESS installations require SEGESA connection approval. No publicly accessible SEGESA technical specification document specifically for BESS grid connection or energy storage system integration has been identified as of the dataset date. Equatorial Guinea has no strong national standards body (no confirmed equivalent of a national standards organisation publishing mandatory technical regulations). In the absence of a published national grid-connection framework for BESS, project owners and international developers typically reference IEC 62933 series standards (Electrical Energy Storage Systems) and engage SEGESA directly for project-specific connection terms. The nascent grid-tie and storage market in Equatorial Guinea means connection approval is handled on a project-by-project basis with SEGESA.
summary.zh: SEGESA（赤道几内亚电力公司）是赤道几内亚的国家电力公用事业单位及唯一电网运营商，负责发电、输电和配电。赤道几内亚电网运行参数为230/400 V（单相/三相）、50 Hz——与该国西班牙裔中非洲背景一致的西班牙/IEC传承系统。所有并网BESS装置均须取得SEGESA并网批准。截至本数据集日期，未发现SEGESA公开发布专门针对BESS并网或储能系统接入的技术规格文件。赤道几内亚无强大的国家标准机构（未确认有发布强制性技术法规的国家标准化组织等效机构）。在缺乏已发布BESS国家并网框架的情况下，项目业主和国际开发商通常引用IEC 62933系列标准（电化学储能系统），并直接与SEGESA接触确定项目专属并网条款。赤道几内亚初期电网接入和储能市场意味着并网批准须就每个项目与SEGESA逐案处理。
summary.zht: SEGESA（赤道幾內亞電力公司）是赤道幾內亞的國家電力公用事業單位及唯一電網運營商，負責發電、輸電和配電。赤道幾內亞電網運行參數為230/400 V（單相/三相）、50 Hz——與該國西班牙裔中非洲背景一致的西班牙/IEC傳承系統。所有併網BESS裝置均須取得SEGESA併網批准。截至本數據集日期，未發現SEGESA公開發布專門針對BESS併網或儲能系統接入的技術規格文件。赤道幾內亞無強大的國家標準機構（未確認有發布強制性技術法規的國家標準化組織等效機構）。在缺乏已發布BESS國家併網框架的情況下，項目業主和國際開發商通常引用IEC 62933系列標準（電化學儲能系統），並直接與SEGESA接觸確定項目專屬併網條款。赤道幾內亞初期電網接入和儲能市場意味著併網批准須就每個項目與SEGESA逐案處理。

standards_or_laws: SEGESA (Sociedad de Electricidad de Guinea Ecuatorial) — national grid operator; grid-connection approval required for all grid-connected BESS; no published BESS-specific technical connection specification confirmed as of dataset date
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected project-specification reference)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference)
Equatorial Guinea grid standard: 230/400 V single-phase/three-phase, 50 Hz (Spanish/IEC legacy)

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2017 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase). Equatorial Guinea's grid is 230/400 V at 50 Hz — the two systems share 50 Hz but differ in voltage. PCS firmware, voltage protection thresholds, and ride-through settings configured for China's 220/380 V grid must be re-parameterised and retested for Equatorial Guinea's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid before connection testing and commissioning. Chinese GB/T grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals are not transferable to Equatorial Guinea and would not be recognised by SEGESA.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2017（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V）。赤道几内亚电网为230/400 V 50 Hz——两个系统共享50 Hz但电压不同。针对中国220/380 V电网配置的PCS固件、电压保护阈值和穿越参数，须在并网测试和调试前重新配置并重新测试，以适应赤道几内亚230/400 V 50 Hz电网条件。中国GB/T并网证书和NEA审批不可转用于赤道几内亚，也不会被SEGESA认可。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2017（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V）。赤道幾內亞電網為230/400 V 50 Hz——兩個系統共享50 Hz但電壓不同。針對中國220/380 V電網配置的PCS韌體、電壓保護閾值和穿越參數，須在併網測試和調試前重新配置並重新測試，以適應赤道幾內亞230/400 V 50 Hz電網條件。中國GB/T併網證書和NEA審批不可轉用於赤道幾內亞，也不會被SEGESA認可。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2017 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Critical gap: No published SEGESA BESS grid-connection technical specification has been confirmed as of the dataset date — this institutional gap is itself the primary risk. Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy SEGESA grid-connection requirements. Key technical differences requiring attention: (a) grid voltage — Equatorial Guinea is 230/400 V whereas China is 220/380 V; both use 50 Hz but voltage differs; PCS voltage protection thresholds and ride-through settings must be reconfigured and retested for 230/400 V operation; (b) engage SEGESA at the earliest project stage to obtain project-specific connection requirements before equipment design is finalised — no public framework exists to guide pre-engagement preparation; (c) IEC 62933 series compliance — where project specifications or SEGESA require IEC 62933-2-1 or IEC 62933-5-2 evidence, prepare test and design documentation accordingly; Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent; (d) confirm communication and SCADA interface protocol requirements with SEGESA for BESS monitoring.
gap.zh: 关键差距：截至本数据集日期，SEGESA BESS并网技术规格尚未得到确认——这一制度性空白本身即是主要风险。中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足SEGESA并网要求。需注意的主要技术差异：（a）电网电压——赤道几内亚为230/400 V，中国为220/380 V；两者均使用50 Hz但电压不同；PCS电压保护阈值和穿越参数须重新配置并重新测试以适应230/400 V运行；（b）在设备设计最终确定前，应在项目最早阶段与SEGESA接触，获取项目专属并网要求——目前无公开框架可指导接触前准备；（c）IEC 62933系列合规——若项目规格或SEGESA要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2证据，须相应准备测试和设计文件；中国GB/T标准不被接受为等效依据；（d）与SEGESA确认BESS监控所需的通信和SCADA接口协议要求。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：截至本數據集日期，SEGESA BESS併網技術規格尚未得到確認——這一制度性空白本身即是主要風險。中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足SEGESA併網要求。需注意的主要技術差異：（a）電網電壓——赤道幾內亞為230/400 V，中國為220/380 V；兩者均使用50 Hz但電壓不同；PCS電壓保護閾值和穿越參數須重新配置並重新測試以適應230/400 V運行；（b）在設備設計最終確定前，應在項目最早階段與SEGESA接觸，獲取項目專屬併網要求——目前無公開框架可指導接觸前準備；（c）IEC 62933系列合規——若項目規格或SEGESA要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2證據，須相應準備測試和設計文件；中國GB/T標準不被接受為等效依據；（d）與SEGESA確認BESS監控所需的通訊和SCADA接口協議要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in principle — SEGESA grid-connection approval is required for all grid-connected BESS in Equatorial Guinea; no published BESS-specific technical connection specification confirmed as of dataset date — engage SEGESA directly
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Equatorial Guinea

source.publisher: SEGESA (Sociedad de Electricidad de Guinea Ecuatorial) — national electricity utility of Equatorial Guinea

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No published SEGESA BESS grid-connection technical specification has been confirmed as of the dataset date — the absence of a published conformity framework is a primary market-access risk. Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy SEGESA requirements. BESS PCS must be re-parameterised for Equatorial Guinea's 230/400 V at 50 Hz (China is 220/380 V — voltage differs despite shared 50 Hz frequency). Engage SEGESA directly at the earliest project stage. All technical connection requirements should be confirmed in writing with SEGESA before equipment procurement is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，SEGESA BESS并网技术规格尚未得到确认——缺乏已发布合格评定框架是主要市场准入风险。中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足SEGESA要求。BESS储能变流器须重新配置为赤道几内亚230/400 V 50 Hz（中国为220/380 V——尽管共享50 Hz频率但电压不同）。应在项目最早阶段直接与SEGESA接触。在设备采购最终确定前，所有技术并网要求均应与SEGESA书面确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，SEGESA BESS併網技術規格尚未得到確認——缺乏已發布合格評定框架是主要市場准入風險。中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足SEGESA要求。BESS儲能變流器須重新配置為赤道幾內亞230/400 V 50 Hz（中國為220/380 V——儘管共享50 Hz頻率但電壓不同）。應在項目最早階段直接與SEGESA接觸。在設備採購最終確定前，所有技術併網要求均應與SEGESA書面確認。
